title: MongoDB Vector Search
text: MongoDB Vector Search keeps embeddings beside BSON documents and metadata, so semantic retrieval, filtering, and document updates share one operational database.

title: Qdrant Collections
text: Qdrant is a vector database whose collections store vectors with payload metadata. Payload indexes accelerate filtered semantic search.

title: HNSW Trade-offs
text: HNSW is an approximate nearest-neighbor graph. Larger search breadth generally improves recall while increasing query latency and compute cost.

title: Hybrid Retrieval
text: Hybrid retrieval combines lexical matching with semantic vector similarity. Reciprocal rank fusion merges rankings without requiring comparable raw scores.

title: Grounded RAG
text: A grounded RAG system retrieves evidence before generation, cites supporting chunks, and refuses to invent an answer when the evidence is insufficient.

title: Metadata Filtering
text: Metadata filters narrow vector search by fields such as language, category, source, or date. Both compared databases must run the same filter cases.
